parameters.query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, COALESCE(up.daily_calorie_target, 2000) as daily_calorie_target, COALESCE(up.daily_protein_target, 50) as daily_protein_target, COALESCE(up.daily_carbs_target, 250) as daily_carbs_target, COALESCE(up.daily_fat_target, 65) as daily_fat_target, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.calories), 0) as total_calories, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.protein_g), 0) as total_protein, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.carbs_g), 0) as total_carbs, COALESCE(SUM(mfi.fat_g), 0) as total_fat FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN meal_logs ml ON u.id = ml.user_id AND DATE(ml.logged_at) = CURRENT_DATE LEFT JOIN meal_food_items mfi ON ml.id = mfi.meal_log_id WHERE u.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.name, up.daily_calorie_target, up.daily_protein_target, up.daily_carbs_target, up.daily_fat_target

values.content: You are an expert nutritionist and health coach. Analyze the user's daily nutrition data and provide a personalized, encouraging summary. Be specific, actionable, and motivational. Use emojis for engagement. Keep it concise but comprehensive.

Please analyze this nutrition data and provide a personalized summary:

User: {{ $json.name }}
Date: {{ $json.date }}

Calories: {{ $json.calories.consumed }} / {{ $json.calories.target }} ({{ $json.calories.percentage }}%)
Protein: {{ $json.protein.consumed }}g / {{ $json.protein.target }}g ({{ $json.protein.percentage }}%)

Current insights: {{ $json.insights.join(', ') }}

Please provide:
1. Overall performance assessment (1-2 sentences)
2. Key achievement or area for improvement
3. One specific recommendation for tomorrow
4. Motivational closing message

Format as JSON with keys: assessment, highlight, recommendation, motivation

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate HTML email template with AI summary const emailData = $input.all(); const htmlEmails = []; for (const email of emailData) { const data = email.json; const ai = data.ai_summary; const htmlContent = `

${data.emoji} Daily Nutrition Report

${data.name}

${data.date}

📊 AI Assessment

${ai.assessment}

� Today's Performance

${data.calories.consumed}
Calories
of ${data.calories.target} goal
${data.protein.consumed}g
Protein
of ${data.protein.target}g goal

💡 Key Highlight

${ai.highlight}

📝 Tomorrow's Recommendation

${ai.recommendation}

🎉 Motivation

${ai.motivation}

Open CalAI App

🤖 Powered by CalAI Nutrition AI

Your personalized health journey continues!

`; const emailData = { to: data.email, subject: data.email_subject, html: htmlContent, from: 'calai-nutrition@example.com' }; htmlEmails.push({ json: emailData }); } return htmlEmails;
